Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Continued To Sep-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Successor Trustee Sandra O. Wilson And To Appoint Private Professional Fiducuary Debra J. Dolch As Sucessor Trustee Or Receiver;For
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Continued To Jun-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Karin Dettner (Petitioner). Stephen Brunner for Sandra Opsahl Wilson (Trustee).

Mr. Skootsky requested a continuance stating that the matters pending in Plumas County had been continued due to the passing of the Judge. Mr. Brunner stated that the valuation of the Plumas property was not before the Court, that there was no evidence or facts in support of the petition and that the petition should be denied and heard in Plumas County. Mr. Skootsky argued that it was premature to make a ruling and that he needed to do discovery and take depositions. The matter was continued to June 11, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

Petition To Remove Successor Trustee Sandra O. Wilson And To Appoint Private Professional Fiducuary Debra J. Dolch As Sucessor Trustee Or Receiver;For
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Continued To Apr-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
